name: Failed Logons with Different Usernames from Same IP
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Destination IP and different Source IP, Username in 15 minutes
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Destination IP and different Source IP, Username in 15 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Failed Logons with Different Usernames from Same IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Destination IP and different Source IP, Username in 15 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Login Failures to the Same Destination
Event description: Detected authentication failures (more than 10) to the same destination IP.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Destination IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
